subcodes.first_line: O seeker of the Kingdom, though thou soarest in pursuit of literary knowledge, yet must thy purpose in attainment be the power to expound and express [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب ملکوت بتحصیل علوم ادبیه بپرواز ولی مقصدت باید این باشد که در تحریر و تقریر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
